description_long: This is a Kalashnikov-style assault rifle, featuring a wooden fixed stock and handguard with a dark, polished finish. The receiver and barrel assembly are constructed from blackened metal, giving the weapon a robust and utilitarian appearance. The rifle is equipped with a curved detachable box magazine, typical of AK-pattern firearms, and standard iron sights mounted along the top of the receiver and barrel. The front sight is a post, while the rear sight is a notched tangent, both made of metal. The muzzle is fitted with a simple slant compensator, and the trigger, safety lever, and magazine release are all visible and accessible. The overall design is iconic, blending wood and metal elements for durability and reliability in urban environments.
description: A classic AK-style rifle with a wooden fixed stock, black metal receiver, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Barrel-end view, highlighting the narrow profile, front sight post, and muzzle device.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, displaying the wooden stock, handguard, magazine, and receiver details.
description_view_3: Stock-end view, showing the slim width of the rifle and the rear sight alignment.
